goal: Capture the real repo-local serving behavior after the active-workspace fix and append the resulting evidence to the lab ledger.
constraints: Record only commands that actually executed in this workspace
State both the repaired behavior and the residual advisory noise honestly
behavioral_changes: The repo now carries a real serving-validation artifact set after the active-workspace fix.
The run ledger now includes three additional serving-validation entries.
verification_targets: PYTHONPATH=src python -m pytest tests/test_chip_runtime.py tests/test_chip_context_injector.py tests/test_chip_advisor.py tests/test_chip_mcp_server.py tests/test_hooks.py -q

Keep converting repo-local serving behavior into real operating history rather than assuming internal fixes are enough.
